meta.name: BIS-15 Barratt Impulsiveness Scale
meta.description: The BIS-15 is a 15-item scale measuring three dimensions of impulsivity: Attentional (difficulty focusing), Motor (acting without thinking), and Non-planning (lack of future orientation).
meta.author: Spinella (2007)
meta.reference: Spinella M. Normative data and a short form of the Barratt Impulsiveness Scale. International Journal of Neuroscience. 2007;117(3):359-368.
meta.instruction: Please rate how often each statement applies to you.

questions.text: I make up my mind quickly
I act on the spur of the moment
I answer without thinking when I don't know the answer
I don't plan for the future
I am more interested in the present than the future
I find it hard to think about complex problems

ranges.label: Low Impulsivity
ranges.description: Your impulsivity level is low. You generally think things through before acting. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your thoughtful and planned approach to decisions
Being cautious is positive, but also allow some flexibility in adapting to changes
Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

ranges.label: Moderate Impulsivity
ranges.description: Your impulsivity is within the normal range. You maintain a good balance between thinking and acting. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your good self-regulation skills
Give yourself extra time to think before making important decisions
Keep practicing focus and planning skills
Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality

ranges.label: Elevated Impulsivity
ranges.description: Your impulsivity is somewhat elevated. You may sometimes act without fully considering the consequences. This level of trait expression is slightly above average but within the normal range of individual variation.
suggestions: Try pausing for a few seconds before making decisions
Use to-do lists and schedules to enhance planning
Practice mindfulness meditation to improve self-awareness
If impulsive behavior causes problems, consider consulting a professional
Learn how this trait influences your behavior and relationships

ranges.label: High Impulsivity
ranges.description: Your impulsivity level is high. You may frequently act without thinking, which can affect work, relationships, and daily life. This trait is notably expressed and may influence your interpersonal interactions and self-perception in certain situations.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional for evaluation
Learn delayed gratification and self-control techniques
Establish daily routines and structured lifestyle habits
Consider cognitive behavioral therapy to manage impulsive behavior
Explore whether impulsive behavior may be related to ADHD or other conditions

attentional.label: Low
attentional.description: Attentional impulsivity is low. You have good ability to concentrate. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

attentional.label: Moderate
attentional.description: Attentional impulsivity is at a moderate level. You may sometimes have difficulty focusing. This trait is notably expressed and may influence your interpersonal interactions and self-perception in certain situations.
suggestions: Gain deeper insight into how this trait affects your relationships
Learn to adjust your behavior in different situations
If the trait causes distress, consider consulting a professional
Develop self-awareness and emotional management skills

attentional.label: High
attentional.description: Attentional impulsivity is elevated. You may frequently have difficulty concentrating. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

attentional.label: Very High
attentional.description: Attentional impulsivity is very high. Significant difficulty with concentration; further evaluation recommended. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

motor.label: Low
motor.description: Motor impulsivity is low. Your actions are generally well-considered. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

motor.label: Moderate
motor.description: Motor impulsivity is at a moderate level. You occasionally act without thinking. This trait is notably expressed and may influence your interpersonal interactions and self-perception in certain situations.
suggestions: Gain deeper insight into how this trait affects your relationships
Learn to adjust your behavior in different situations
If the trait causes distress, consider consulting a professional
Develop self-awareness and emotional management skills

motor.label: High
motor.description: Motor impulsivity is elevated. Impulsive actions occur frequently. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

motor.label: Very High
motor.description: Motor impulsivity is very high. You frequently act without thinking; consider seeking professional help. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

nonplanning.label: Low
nonplanning.description: Non-planning impulsivity is low. You have good planning and foresight abilities. This indicates that this personality dimension falls within the typical range commonly seen in the general population.
suggestions: Understanding your personality traits supports personal growth
Every person has unique strengths and value in their personality
Flexibly apply your traits in different situations

nonplanning.label: Moderate
nonplanning.description: Non-planning impulsivity is at a moderate level. You sometimes lack long-term planning. This trait is notably expressed and may influence your interpersonal interactions and self-perception in certain situations.
suggestions: Gain deeper insight into how this trait affects your relationships
Learn to adjust your behavior in different situations
If the trait causes distress, consider consulting a professional
Develop self-awareness and emotional management skills

nonplanning.label: High
nonplanning.description: Non-planning impulsivity is elevated. You rarely plan ahead for the future. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships

nonplanning.label: Very High
nonplanning.description: Non-planning impulsivity is very high. You almost never plan ahead; consider developing planning habits. This personality dimension score is elevated and may significantly influence your behavior patterns and relationships across various contexts. Further exploration is recommended.
suggestions: Consider discussing the impact of personality traits with a counselor
Learn effective communication and conflict management skills
Develop flexible coping strategies
Focus on personal growth and improving relationships
